title: Siklus Tak Berujung di Laundry Pak RT
theme: Mengeksplorasi ironi kehidupan sehari-hari melalui interaksi pelanggan yang absurd dan rutinitas mencuci yang tak ada habisnya, menyoroti sisi gelap humor manusia.

cover.prompt: Cinematic photography of a bustling neighborhood laundromat interior. The foreground features soft, towering stacks of colorful, freshly laundered textiles, creating a gentle barrier. In the mid-ground, a rhythmic line of active washing machines and dryers are softly illuminated by warm, natural light filtering through large windows. The composition uses shallow depth of field, creating a visual intrigue and suggesting a perspective of observation from behind the comforting piles of fabric. The overall mood is one of quiet contemplation amidst everyday cycles, hinting at the gentle absurdity of life.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Pak RT, a cynical laundromat owner, observes the absurd dramas of his customers. He notices a recurring strange habit from Pak Budi, who consistently leaves odd items in his laundry. Pak RT decides to 'address' this issue with a cynical, unconventional method by publicly attaching one of Pak Budi's forgotten items with a mocking note. This leads to Pak Budi's public humiliation and outrage, but Pak RT finds immense personal satisfaction in the chaotic outcome, confirming his belief in humanity's endless absurdity.
meta.target_emotion: Amusement, cynical satisfaction, recognition of everyday absurdities, schadenfreude.
